sqlMap.select: SELECT A.containerid , B.containertypename , B.containertypename2 , B.containertypeid FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyNum}.TBCONTAINER A JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyNum}.TBCONTAINERTYPE B ON A.containertypeid = B.containertypeid WHERE A.containerowndepid = #deptID# ORDER BY B.containertypeid

SELECT A.containerid , B.containertypename , B.containertypename2 , B.containertypeid FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyNum}.TBCONTAINER A JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyNum}.TBCONTAINERTYPE B ON A.containertypeid = B.containertypeid JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyNum}.TBCONTAINERUSEDEP C ON A.containerid = C.containerid WHERE C.usedepid = #deptID# AND A.containerowndepid = #deptID# ORDER BY B.containertypeid

SELECT A.containerid , B.containertypename , B.containertypename2 , B.containertypeid, A.containerowndepid FROM EZAPPROVALG_${companyNum}.TBCONTAINER A JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyNum}.TBCONTAINERTYPE B ON A.containertypeid = B.containertypeid JOIN EZAPPROVALG_${companyNum}.TBCONTAINERUSEDEP C ON A.containerid = C.containerid WHERE C.usedepid = #deptID# AND A.containerowndepid <> #deptID# ORDER BY A.containerowndepid, B.containertypeid
